'''Helios''' were floating creatures native to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] that eerily resembled [[Human/Legends|Human]] brains.<ref name="SEMP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' {{1st}}
